page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc7.3xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance is configured with 24.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Benchmark data positions this instance in the average performance tier across most compute and memory workloads. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a single-core stress-ng score of 1579.29 and a multi-core score of 12489.46. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 699.05 GB/sec, which drops to 70.8 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. The instance demonstrates solid capabilities in text and image processing, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 6834.0 and a static web serving throughput of 10.62 GB/sec.

Due to its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and lack of local storage, the ecs.hfc7.3xlarge presents clear architectural tradeoffs. It is not suited for memory-intensive databases or large-scale LLM inference, as evidenced by its weak prompt processing speed of 17.92 tokens/sec on a medium 7B model. However, its dedicated CPU cores and AVX-512 instruction support make it highly cost-efficient for compute-bound tasks such as software compilation, web serving, and lightweight serialization workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc7.3xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance featuring 12 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it provides 24.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a 2.0 GB per core ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU hardware, relying on a 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks place this server in the average tier, with a Passmark CPU score of 14001.56 and a static web serving throughput of 10.62 GB/sec. While its low memory-to-CPU ratio makes it less suitable for memory-heavy databases or large language model inference, its dedicated CPU resources are well-suited for compute-bound workloads, software compilation, and web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc7.3xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 24 GB RAM, and a 4 Gbps network baseline, designed for compute-bound workloads.

tagline: A compute-optimized virtual server with dedicated Intel Xeon cores and a balanced resource profile for web serving and compilation.

24.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
